name: Fullscreen Quote
description: Full-screen quote card with large pull quote, attribution name, role, and date tag

fields.WORD_1: The main quote text, e.g. 'We had no idea they had been inside our network for nine months.'
fields.WORD_2: Optional second line or continuation of the quote, or leave as empty context
fields.LABEL_1: Name of the person being quoted, e.g. 'MGM RESORTS CEO'
fields.LABEL_2: Their role or context, e.g. 'Testimony to Senate Committee, 2024'
fields.SUB_LABEL: Date or tag shown top right, e.g. 'SEPT 2023'
